content:
d: var(--surface-2); }
.role-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
.graph-controls { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem; align-items: center; }
.depth-control { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; }
```

- Clicking an entry opens the reader panel
- Hover highlights connected nodes, fades others

- Clicking a neighbor card navigates graph + updates reader
- Filters narrow visible nodes
